description: A long-time customer with a good payment history requests to have a late fee waived as a one-time courtesy.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and the late fee on their account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the customer's account and the specific fee.

nodes.task_description: Review the customer's payment history and tenure.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the customer has a long, positive payment history.
Agent successfully removes the fee from the customer's balance.
